title: The Papers: 'Borrowing costs hit 28-year high' and 'Come cry with me'
description: The upcoming local elections on Thursday and jet fuel shortages dominate Wednesday's papers.

title: Indiana firefighter duo return lost American flag to stranger’s home: ‘It doesn’t hurt to help a neighbor’
description: "Doing a small act of kindness or doing something good for somebody whether anybody's watching or not, if everybody did that, the world would be a much better place," firefighter Bryan Haskel said.

title: James Harden Points Out Reason for Cavaliers' Game 1 Loss
description: James Harden believes he contributed to the Cleveland Cavaliers Game 1 loss to the Detroit Pistons on Tuesday night.

title: Donovan Mitchell Frustrated by Officiating After Cavaliers Lose to Pistons
description: The Cleveland Cavaliers lost to the Detroit Pistons in Game 1 of their Eastern Conference semifinals series on Tuesday.

title: LeBron James Can’t Beat Thunder Alone — And It’s Getting Ugly
description: LeBron James is doing all he can to lead the Los Angeles Lakers against the OKC Thunder. Sadly, he can't do it alone.

title: US Coast Guard seeks owner of sailboat moored near missing mom Lynette Hooker’s vessel on night of disappearance
description: Coast Guard investigators are searching for the owner of a sailboat that was moored near the Lynette and Brian Hooker's 45-foot sailboat, the "SV Soulmate."

title: Minor league hockey fans throw debris on ice, refuse to leave arena after bizarre overtime goal
description: The Sweetest Place on Earth turned sour on Tuesday night when minor league hockey fans began throwing debris onto the ice after they didn’t believe a game-winning goal had been scored in a rivalry playoff matchup.

title: Oil Falls and Stocks Gain as Trump Changes Course in Strait of Hormuz
description: Oil prices fell and stocks rose after President Trump’s about-face to pause the U.S. operation to escort commercial ships through the Strait of Hormuz

title: Insider Sets the Record Straight on Aaron Rodgers-Cardinals Rumors
description: Rumors have been growing that Aaron Rodgers wants to join the Arizona Cardinals, and one ESPN analyst reveals whether it's true.

title: Romania’s pro-EU government ousted after no-confidence vote
description: The pro-European Union coalition of Romanian Prime Minister Ilie Bolojan has collapsed after a vote of no confidence.

title: Giants’ multi-homer game goes to waste as Padres light up Logan Webb
description: An early lead with their ace on the mound wasn't enough for the Giants to beat the Padres.

title: LIU athletics placed on three-year probation after NCAA eligibility probe
description: LIU was placed on a three-year probation by the NCAA following an investigation.

title: To stay or risk the 'Road of Death' - Ukrainian civilians trapped in frontline city
description: People in the Ukrainian city of Oleshky say they have been cut off from fresh supplies of food or medicine for months.
